name: git-your-lark
description: Preview-first Markdown workspace publishing and importing for Lark/Feishu through lark-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Publish and import Markdown workspaces with Lark using reviewable previews.
interface.longDescription: Git Your Lark is a Codex plugin that uses lark-cli to publish local Markdown workspaces into Lark/Feishu documents and import reviewed Lark content back into Markdown. It generates reviewable previews before publishing or applying changes and verifies results after sync.
defaultPrompt: Sync this Markdown workspace to Lark.
Preview this Lark sync before publishing.
Pull this Lark wiki into Obsidian with a preview first.
